_README: The onboarding decision graph — DATA, never code. Mirrors the deck SDUI contract (uiSchema.js) but for a survey flow: typed nodes resolved via INPUT_REGISTRY (Onboarding.jsx), branching expressed as declarative `next` rules evaluated by resolveNext() (flowResolver.js). No functions live in this payload; the security boundary is identical to registry.js. Normalized by normalizeFlow() before use — a dangling `goto` falls through to the next linear node, never a dead end.

meta.title: How many of the last 7 days did you execute?
meta.hint: Count the days you did the most important thing you planned. Behavior, not self-image — this sets where the book starts.

meta.title: Name the routine that never misses
meta.hint: What already happens every day, no matter what? Your first block gets anchored to it — a cue you already obey beats a clock you don't.

meta.title: Configure your protocols
meta.hint: Optional modules, and how your plan gets generated. Recovery unlocks the counter-move step when it applies.

meta.title: Identify your primary time-leak
meta.hint: The one that costs you the most hours. The engine defends against it first.

meta.title: When does the leak hit hardest?
meta.hint: Locate that leak in the day. This is the one window your Guardian will defend on day one.

meta.title: Pre-load your counter-move
meta.hint: When the pull hits inside that window — what's your move? Deciding now is the whole trick.

meta.title: Set the engine
meta.hint: When the clock starts, and when you actually run hottest.

meta.title: What is this mostly for?
meta.hint: Directs the blocks seeded into your schedule and targets.

meta.title: Dictate your day
meta.hint: Write the blocks your day actually contains — class, training, work, the call you keep skipping. The book takes dictation; it never invents your life. At least one line. Times optional; edit any day from the deck.

meta.title: Name the mission
meta.hint: The single thing this is all pointed at. Optional — but it sharpens everything downstream.

meta.title: What are the odds you actually execute it?
meta.hint: Confidence in THIS mission, not discipline in general. Low is fine — it just tells the engine to scaffold instead of push.

meta.title: When a streak breaks, what does the tape show?
meta.hint: Your historical pattern, not your intention. No judgment — this calibrates every message you get after a reset.

meta.title: How should your streak work?
meta.hint: How the engine scores you — and how a missed day is handled.

meta.title: Pick your interface
meta.hint: The visual system for your whole deck. Change it anytime in Settings.

meta.title: Link your health data
meta.hint: Optional. Streams sleep, activity, and heart-rate into your biometric readouts. Runs on-device; skip to leave it disabled.

meta.title: Set your accountability
meta.hint: A witness makes a miss cost something. They get a one-tap text from the night page — sent by you, never by the app.
